category_sources: Official homepage says FreeTDS lets Unix/Linux programs natively talk to Microsoft SQL Server and Sybase databases.
source_facts.description says Libraries to talk to Microsoft SQL Server and Sybase databases.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use FreeTDS.
docs_sources: Official docs page lists the User Guide, Reference Manual, and FAQ as end-user documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page is labeled Official FreeTDS repository.
Official User Guide package/source page gives git clone https://github.com/FreeTDS/freetds.git.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes SQL Server, Sybase, TDS protocol, and APIs including ODBC.
source_facts.executables lists command-line utilities such as tsql and freebcp.
